cards.name: LISA E COLEMAN
cards.notes: Operator: Lisa Coleman. QSL card features Louisiana Yard Dog (alligator) theme. Personal message thanks K8JKU for QSO card and mentions it was overlooked in logbook. References POTA (Parks on the Air). Equipment: Ten Tec Omni radio with OCF Dipole 40' antenna, 100W power output. Grid square EM31vj, CQ Zone 4, ITU Zone 7

cards.name: Todd A Trosclair
cards.notes: Operator: Todd Trosclair. Location: Gonzales, LA. QSL (Tnx) received. RST 53

cards.name: USS KIDD AMATEUR RADIO CLUB
cards.notes: USS Kidd ARC - Amateur Radio Club station aboard USS Kidd (DD-661) destroyer, moored on Mississippi River in Baton Rouge. Ship was launched February 28, 1942, christened to honor Rear Admiral Isaac Campbell Kidd Sr., earned 12 battle stars in Pacific theater and Korea service. Now serves as memorial museum. Rig: FT-7300, Power: 400W, Antenna: Long Wire. Contact confirmed with thanks for working USS Kidd James

cards.name: Robert T Butler, III
cards.notes: Contact made at US-10448 Century Historic Site, Louisiana. Parks on the Air activation. Message from Bob Butler: 'Thanks for hunting me mobile and helping me achieve a Kilo at US-10448. Pota On. James, thanks for helping me over the top.' Station operated mobile

cards.name: ROBERT W DAVIS
cards.notes: Contact made with a light loose with IT antenna. Sender (Bob Davis) mentioned always liking working the Potas

cards.name: Brian C Derx
cards.notes: POTA US-3313 activation. RST 57. Band 20m at 14.263 MHz

cards.name: KENT R SAMPSON
cards.notes: Bonneville county. Grid: DN43al

cards.name: Robert J Carrell
cards.notes: Grid DN22so, Twin Falls County, Idaho

cards.name: MICHAEL A ZYARA, JR
cards.notes: Pike County, Grid FN21mg. Contact via K8JKU. Message: 'Thank you for the QSO card James. Best for the holiday season.' IC-7610, 256W @ 70 feet. Hamm's noise RG4 antenna. Signed '73 Mike'

cards.name: ROBERT H CAVERLY, JR
cards.notes: Chester County, FN20da. TS430 transceiver. Thanks for the QSO activation. Operator Bob Caverly, age 73

cards.name: JOSEPH V GURA, JR
cards.notes: Operator: Joseph V. Gura, Jr. Vintage carousel/merry-go-round ride image

cards.name: ROBERT PROSSER
cards.notes: KJ6ER POTA PERFormer 1/4 wave antenna. RST 59. Pse QSL Tnx. Additional note on card mentions TNX for Activating

cards.name: DESMOND E WARZEL
cards.notes: Special Event - May 31, 1889 Johnstown Flood 2000 Fatalities. Operator: Des Warzel. Grid: FN00nm

cards.name: Mark A Hyman
cards.notes: CQ Zone 5, ITU Zone 8, Grid EN90. ARRL member. Contact confirmed with K8JKU at 0106 UTC on 7.270 MHz, RST 59. TNX QSL

cards.name: FRANK R GRAZIANO
cards.notes: Presque Isle State Park. POTA (Parks On The Air) contact. Operator: Frank Graziano. Contact made via Parks On The Air program

cards.name: DOUGLAS H STENGER
cards.notes: POTD QSO from Park K-3315. Station located in Cumberland County, Pennsylvania. 100 watts, Icom 7iK transceiver, 6/70 meter dipole antenna

cards.name: Steven A Fazekas
cards.notes: Kenwood TS-50 transceiver, 100 watts, 33 ft vertical antenna. Contact with K8JKU. POTA reference K-3284 GSO mentioned in handwritten note. Station located in Butler County, Pennsylvania. Grid: FN00dr, CQ Zone: 5, ITU Zone: 8

cards.name: WINDMILL AMATEUR RADIO GROUP
cards.notes: Windmill Amateur Radio Group. Serving Wayne, Lackawanna & Susquehanna Counties. Let's Talk Radio

cards.name: Charles E Bricker
cards.notes: McIntyre Wild Area, Lycoming County, PA. Equipment: Yaesu G-90 radio, 40-10 EFHW antenna, 20W power. Sent RST 57, Received RST 59

cards.name: JOHN L HABERKERN
cards.notes: Amateur radio around the world. Card signed by John Haberkern. PSE QSL TNX notation present

cards.name: Jeremy S Smoyer
cards.notes: Operator: Jeremy Smoyer. Grid: FN20. CQ Zone: 5. ITU Zone: 8. QSO with K8JKU. RST: 33. Front photo shows Waimea Canyon State Park - Kauai. Rear photo shows Hanalei Pier - Kauai. Personal message: 'Not all who wander are lost...' and 'thank you'

cards.name: Robert J Stevens
cards.notes: Operator: Robert Stevens. Rig: FT-891, 100W. Antenna: MPAS 2.0. Grid: FN11R. Tioga County, Pennsylvania. TNX QSL sent via POTA US-1361

cards.name: STEPHEN E RICHENDRFER
cards.notes: Grid: FN11tb, Columbia County. First licensed as KA3IWW in 1982. QSL modes: DXCC-Mixed, WAC-Mixed, WAS-CW Mixed Digital. TNX for QSO, best 73

cards.name: Jeremy S Smoyer
cards.notes: Waimea Canyon State Park, Kauai shown in front photo. Hanalei Pier, Kauai shown in rear photo. QSO with K8JKU. RST 33. Grid FN20, CQ Zone 5, ITU Zone 8

cards.name: FRANK A GIRELLO
cards.notes: Uncle Frank Girello, Lebanon County Grid FN10ti. Ham radio gear related. Enjoys collecting QSL cards. Thanks for the QSOs, 73

cards.name: Steven K Smith
cards.notes: POTA activation. Contact also made with KC3JAS on same date. Sender is Steve & Judy Smith, DuBois PA. Equipment: Kenwood TS-890S base, Kenwood TS-590SG POTA, Alpha Hextenna antenna. References K-1476 and K-5472. Sender hopes to make contact again

cards.name: Thomas Dumire
cards.notes: Grid FN20ji, Bucks County PA. TNX OSL card received

cards.name: JESSE A HICKEY
cards.notes: Portable operation. Athens Radio Club. Grid square EM83JW. Contact made via portable equipment setup in wooded area

cards.name: Nathan H. Wood, K2G
cards.notes: Special event card commemorating Button Gwinnett, a Georgia signer of the Declaration of Independence. Card describes the 1777 duel between Gwinnett and Lachlan McIntosh on May 16, 1777, in which Gwinnett died on May 19 from his wounds at age 42

cards.name: Dan Muntz
cards.notes: POTA activation - Parks on the Air. Grid: EM80hu, ITU Zone 8, CQ Zone 5. Contact time 12:22 UTC. RST: 42. Verified QSO

cards.name: Chad W Cone
cards.notes: Operator: Chad Cone. QSL via K8JKU. Back of card shows EM74oe in Bartow County, Georgia. Message: 'Thank you for the contact.'

cards.name: ROBERT C PITTS
cards.notes: Straight Key Century Club member #1537. Contact with K8JKU via SSB on 14 MHz. Operator: James Mills. Rig: IC-7300 with EF1W antenna. Colquitt County, Georgia. Grid: EM81cc

cards.name: HOWARD P EDWARDS
cards.notes: Contact from Robins area. Aurora visible in image suggests northern sky observation. RST 5/9. SSB contact on 20m band

cards.name: MICHAEL G PATTILLO
cards.notes: Operator: Michael G Pattillo. Address: 560 Mountainbrooke Circle. Gwinnett County. Grid: EM73wu. Equipment: FT-920, FT-840, FTM-400XD. Antenna: 2x. Confirming contact with PSE QSL TNX

cards.name: Chad W Cone
cards.notes: Rural farm location with snowy evergreen forest backdrop. Card indicates EM74oe grid square

cards.name: STEPHEN M WALLS
cards.notes: Paulding County, Georgia. Operator: Steve Walls. 10-10 # 26381. RST: 59. ARRL Emergency Service and Ten-Ten International Net affiliations noted

cards.name: WESLEY N SHULTZ
cards.notes: TNX for the P2P (Park to Park) from a backpacking trip in the Cohutta Realm, Georgia. TX-500 transceiver, EFHW antenna

cards.name: Russell K Bell
cards.notes: 75th Ranger Regiment (RGT) station. Harris County. QSL James Mills. Contact confirmed with K8JKU

cards.name: JON D CURL
cards.notes: Gwinnett County, Georgia. Operator: Dave Curl. Contact confirmed with K8JKU on 14.263 MHz at 1929 UTC

cards.name: WILLIAM J KERSEY
cards.notes: William Kersey. Houston County. Grid Houston CQ zone 5 ITU zone 8. Comments note FTDX-10 100W PEP EFHW antenna configuration

cards.name: David C Nelms
cards.notes: Gordon County Grid EM74. Operator: Felton Floyd. QSL via K4FYW. Special event or club station

cards.name: Aaron Turner
cards.notes: Transceiver: 7396. Antenna: 160m Loop. RST: 59. Thanks for QSL!

cards.name: Carlton F Bellamy
cards.notes: IOTA reference 78028. Coweta County. Thank you message for pota contact. 15 watts, EFHw antenna. Sent to K8JTM in Clarkston, Michigan

cards.name: CRAIG M BAILEY
cards.notes: Parks on the Air (POTA) reference. EM84 - Hall Co. 73 QSL Tnx

cards.name: RICKY L BRAMLETT
cards.notes: Pickens County, Georgia. Operator: Ricky Bramlett

cards.name: Delaware Valley Radio Association
cards.notes: ARRL VEC volunteer examiner. Operator: Tonja G. Jesko. Burke County, Georgia. Grid Square: EM93cc. SKCC member (#29004). POTA affiliated

cards.name: Walter J Cannon
cards.notes: Union County Grid: EM84bt. Operator W. Jerry Cannon. QSO conducted from boat on lake. RST 59

cards.name: Robert J Achtenberg
cards.notes: Sent from Roswell RiverWalk location. Cat Control themed card.5, Clarkston ME 49247. FT 9914 (Ionolink) heard fan dipole

cards.name: WILLIAM E WOOD
cards.notes: Harris County, Georgia. Contact with K8JKU. Sender thanks for POTA (Parks on the Air) activation. Notes hope to work again

cards.name: Dana W Massengill
cards.notes: Operator: Wade Massengill. Dipole antenna. 100 watts transmitter power. Grid: EM73

cards.name: JULIUS B WLASCHIN
cards.notes: Butch Wlaschin, Sussex County, grid FM28. Activating POTA K-1734 Delaware Seashore State Park. 1939 UTC, RST 59/59. FT-891 at 45W, homebrew antenna. Many tnx for call, hope CU agn. 73, Butch

cards.name: Mark R Hinrichsen
cards.notes: Mark R. Hinrichsen, Butler County, grid EM79si. 13:51 UTC, RST 59, POTA US-3305, IC-7300. Card also confirms a second QSO: 2024-07-20, 13:32 UTC, 7.268 MHz, SSB, RST 59, POTA US-3312

cards.name: Justin M Colville
cards.notes: Justin Colville, grid FM07. 22:18 UTC, RST 59, THX 73's. German Shepherd card. Worked K8JKU's K-3313 activation one minute after WB3DJZ

cards.name: DARRYL J CALKINS
cards.notes: Darryl J. Calkins PE, Windsor County, grid FN33to. 2318 UTC, RST 59. IC-7100 at 80W into an end fed. US Army 1970-2006, Engineer Regiment de Fleury Bronze. White Mountains from his VT homestead on the card

cards.name: DAVID V PORTER
cards.notes: David Porter. 2110 UTC, RST 5/9, phone. IC-7300 at 100W into an inverted V. Kansas sunflower field card. Hope to hear you again soon. 73, Dave

cards.name: Jeffrey J Guidry
cards.notes: Jeffrey Guidry, Lafourche Parish, grid EL49. 0024 UTC, RST 59. Yaesu FTDX10 at 100W into an end fed

cards.name: Randall J Landry
cards.notes: Randall Landry, Tangipahoa Parish, grid EM40sk. 21:23 UTC, RST 59. IC-7300 at 100W into a Moxon at 32 ft. Louisiana bayou sunset card: 73 From the Heart of Louisiana. Thanks for the contact. 73, Randy

cards.name: MARK S MCKOWN
cards.notes: Mark McKown, Union Parish, grid EM32ts. 13:37 UTC, RST 55. Hunter card for K8JKU's POTA K-3322 activation

cards.name: WILLIAM B MORGAN
cards.notes: Bill Morgan, Chester County, grid FM19xs. 21:32 UTC, RST 59/59. Eagle and flag card. Handwritten note: thanks for the QSO and good conditions, hope to work you a few more times

cards.name: ROBERT A NAUNAS, JR
cards.notes: Robert A. Naunas Jr. 22:17 UTC, RST 59+20. FT-991A at 10W into an end-fed long wire. Worked K8JKU's POTA K-3313 activation. The card stock itself was printed in 1978 (Vintage!!) by Brownie W3CJI

cards.name: JOEL N MYERS
cards.notes: Joel Myers, Bartow County, grid EM74oe. 1400 UTC. Truck and SunnyBrook fifth-wheel card, 1st Signal Brigade patch

cards.name: CONYERS DXERS
cards.notes: Jerry L. Jones. 19:34 UTC, RST 59+. Running a Xiegu X-6100 at 1.7 watts into a homebrew 5-element monobander at 93 ft. Back note mentions 217 countries confirmed and an FTDX-9000D. Worked the same activation as WA0CIE five minutes apart

cards.name: STEPHEN D GLASS
cards.notes: Stephen Glass, operating portable from POTA K-7909 Germany Creek WMA, McDuffie County GA, grid EM83so. 16:13 UTC, RST 59/59. IC-7300 into a DX Commander Expedition. Thank you for the QSO into K-7909. Thanks and POTA on James, 73! Signed Doug
